what_are_your_habits.title: What Are Your Habits?
what_are_your_habits.intro_description: Small daily habits influence stress. Let's explore yours gently.
what_are_your_habits.body_subtitle: Which of these has felt a little off lately? (Select any that apply)
what_are_your_habits.body_options: I eat more than usual when stressed
I haven't been moving or exercising much
I haven't been going outside much
My personal care routine has changed
what_are_your_habits.mind_options: I often imagine the worst-case scenario
I feel guilty about things I've done or didn't do
I find it hard to relax
what_are_your_habits.coping_options: I avoid tasks when I'm stressed
I scroll on my phone a lot to distract myself
I spend time alone to cope
I throw myself into work when stressed
I talk to someone about how I feel
I do breathing exercises to calm down
I watch TV or play games to distract myself
I'm not sure how I respond to stress
what_are_your_habits.question_stress: Which habit increases your stress later?
what_are_your_habits.question_calm: Which one habit could help you feel calmer?
what_are_your_habits.insight_description: Tap below to see simple habits that can help reduce stress.
what_are_your_habits.suggestions: Try going to bed a little earlier tonight
Step outside for fresh air today
Take a break from scrolling for a while
Finish one task you've been putting off
what_are_your_habits.final_text: Small changes matter. Consistency creates calm.
